rationale: Both candidates independently validate the parent-first ordering assumption that Gaohan123 questioned (already resolved by the docstring in this diff), but neither catches the ground-truth 'please fix precommit' concern, and neither surfaces Bounty-hunter's specific benchmark-script request (Y's suggestion to rerun the e2e test is only a loose analog). X asserts 'Local CI gates (build 3.11/3.12, pre-commit, DCO...) are green,' which directly contradicts the ground-truth reviewer's explicit precommit-failure comment — a grounding error that hurts precision. Y's findings (untested multi_modal_data path, untested None-prompt branch, missing guard comment) are all specific, line-anchored, and independently verifiable, giving it stronger actionability without any comparable false claim.
